2606.24839.title: Grading the Grader: Lessons from Evaluating an Agentic Data Analysis System
2606.24839.paper_summary: Agentic data analysis systems produce rich outputs, including code, numerical results, and verbal diagnostics. This makes them more challenging to evaluate than single-turn LLM responses. It is therefore necessary to distinguish genuine disagreement between an agent's output and a ground-truth answer from grading artifacts. We investigate how reliably automated graders assess such a system and what strategies improve grading quality by applying LAMBDA, a multi-agent data-analysis system, on 153 numerical QRData tasks from DSGym. We develop and evaluate a three-layer human-AI grading cascade: strict regex matching, LLM-based lenient grading, and snippet-based human inspection, which combines non-GenAI and GenAI strategies with different failure profiles. Both automated graders achieve 100% observed precision (0/70 false positives). The lenient grader's recall is 97% against human labels. A keyword-anchored extraction pipeline raises the strict grader's recall by 60 percentage points over a last-number heuristic; the lenient grader is architecturally parser-independent. An iterative nudge mechanism raises grading run success from 36% to 97% and lenient-pass rates from 16% to 46%; comparing nudging with and without original-question re-injection shows that re-injection offers no benefit, confirming the nudge as an answer template cue. We further observe in this case study that variable type is the task metadata field most consistently associated with grading pipeline dynamics and observed outcome grades.
2606.24839.paper_summary_zh: 代理數據分析系統產生豐富的輸出，包括代碼、數值結果和口頭診斷。這使得它們比單回合的LLM回應更具挑戰性來進行評估。因此，有必要區分代理的輸出與真實答案之間的真正分歧與評分工件。我們研究自動評分器如何可靠地評估這樣的系統，以及哪些策略通過在153個來自DSGym的數值QRData任務上應用LAMBDA這個多代理數據分析系統來提高評分質量。我們開發並評估了一個三層的人類-人工智慧評分級聯：嚴格的正則表達式匹配、基於LLM的寬鬆評分和基於片段的人類檢查，這結合了不同失敗輪廓的非GenAI和GenAI策略。兩個自動評分器都達到了100%的觀察精確度（0/70假陽性）。寬鬆評分器的召回率對人類標籤為97%。一個基於關鍵字的提取管道使嚴格評分器的召回率比最後數字啟發式提高了60個百分點；寬鬆評分器在架構上與解析器無關。一個迭代的推動機制將評分運行成功率從36%提高到97%，而寬鬆通過率從16%提高到46%；比較有無原始問題重新注入的推動顯示，重新注入沒有帶來好處，確認推動作為答案模板提示。我們在這個案例研究中進一步觀察到，變量類型是與評分管道動態和觀察結果分數最一致相關的任務元數據字段。
2606.24839.author: Tian Zheng et.al.
